response: Imagine you’re holding a tiny yellow European plug—now try plugging it into one of these outlets: the one with two small circular pins, the one with two big circular pins, or the one with two wide flat pins. Which socket will it fit into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a small yellow Euro plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the small round-pin socket, the large round-pin socket, or the large flat-pin socket. Which one?
